---
title: "UG Library"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

## 📚 Published Books {.unnumbered}

<div class="book-grid">

<a class="book-item" href="agstat-textbook.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <img src="images/UG/statcover.jpg" alt="Textbook of Agricultural Statistics">
  <div class="book-title">Textbook of Agricultural Statistics</div>
  <div class="book-subtitle">Suitable for STAT 3202</div>
</a>

</div>
